articles.title: Walt Disney Company Shs -CAD hedged- Canadian Depositary Receipt Repr Shs Reg S Trade Ideas — TSX:DIS
articles.summary: This article presents various technical and fundamental analyses of Walt Disney Co. (TSX:DIS) stock by different traders and analysts. The common theme revolves around Disney's stock reaching significant support levels, suggesting potential for upward movement despite some short-term downward pressure. Analysts highlight long-term investment opportunities, financial health, and strategic initiatives like AI integration.

articles.title: The Walt Disney Company (DIS): Navigating the Multi-Platform Transformation and Parks Super-Cycle
articles.summary: The Walt Disney Company (DIS) is approaching its Q2 2026 earnings report, focused on a "Dual-Engine Strategy" to scale its streaming business towards double-digit margins and aggressively expand its theme parks. Analysts currently rate DIS a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $133.53, driven by its content monetization, experience-driven moats, and significant parks investment. The company aims for double-digit EPS growth and 10% streaming margins by the end of 2026, while navigating competition and content costs.

articles.title: Stocks to Watch This Week: AMD Reports, Disney Earns, Roblox Fights Back
articles.summary: This article highlights five key stocks—AMD, Apple, Broadcom, Disney, and Roblox—that are expected to drive market attention this week due to upcoming earnings reports and recent performance. Investors will be scrutinizing AMD's AI chip and data-center revenue, Apple's ability to maintain post-earnings gains, Broadcom's role in AI infrastructure, Disney's streaming profitability and theme park demand, and Roblox's user growth following safety changes. These companies represent key themes in the current market, from AI hardware to consumer spending and platform safety.

articles.title: The Walt Disney Company $DIS Position Trimmed by RIA Advisory Group LLC
articles.summary: RIA Advisory Group LLC significantly reduced its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 51.3% in the fourth quarter, selling 12,506 shares. Despite this trim, Disney successfully beat its quarterly earnings estimates with $1.63 EPS and a revenue increase of 5.2% year-over-year. The company faces near-term risks including an FCC review of broadcast licenses and public backlash over Marvel layoffs, while Wall Street analysts largely maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $133.53.

articles.title: Sachetta LLC Decreases Stock Holdings in The Walt Disney Company $DIS
articles.summary: Sachetta LLC significantly reduced its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 73.8% in Q4, selling 4,899 shares and retaining 1,739 shares valued at $198,000. Despite this, Wall Street holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target of $133.53, though the company faces rising regulatory risks due to an FCC review of its broadcast licenses and public relations challenges from Marvel layoffs. Various other institutional investors, however, increased their holdings in Disney during recent quarters.

articles.title: Horizon Investments LLC Decreases Stake in The Walt Disney Company $DIS
articles.summary: Horizon Investments LLC reduced its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 7.2% in Q4, selling 5,266 shares but still holding 67,707 shares valued at $7.70 million. Despite this, Wall Street maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus and a price target of $133.53, though some analysts have lowered their targets. The company recently surpassed quarterly earnings and revenue estimates but faces challenges including an FCC review of broadcast licenses and public criticism over Marvel layoffs.

articles.title: ANGHAMI REPORTS FY2025 REVENUE OF $99.3M, UP 27%, ON 3.5M SUBSCRIBERS AND LANDMARK STRATEGIC PARTNERSHIPS
articles.summary: Anghami Inc. reported significant financial growth for FY2025, with revenues reaching $99.3 million, a 27% increase over the previous year. This growth was driven by subscriber gains across Anghami and OSN+, which now total 3.5 million paid subscribers and over 130 million registered users. The company also highlighted strategic partnerships, including a $57 million investment from Warner Bros. Discovery into OSN Streaming Limited and the launch of the "Epic Bundle" with Shahid and Disney+, which have expanded its content offerings and distribution channels across the MENA region.

articles.title: Bath & Body Works launches an out-of-this-galaxy collection
articles.summary: Bath & Body Works has launched a limited-edition Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu collection to coincide with the new film's release. The collection features three new fragrances—Force Flow, Bounty Hunter, and Ice Planet—inspired by the characters and universe. Available for rewards members on May 4th and all customers on May 11th, the assortment includes body care, home fragrances, candles, and collectible accessories, extending the Disney collaboration.

articles.title: 1,366,883 Shares in The Walt Disney Company $DIS Bought by PFA Pension Forsikringsaktieselskab
articles.summary: PFA Pension Forsikringsaktieselskab significantly increased its stake in The Walt Disney Company (NYSE:DIS) during the fourth quarter, acquiring over 1.3 million shares valued at approximately $156.9 million. This investment comes amidst a "Moderate Buy" consensus from Wall Street analysts and an average price target of $133.53, despite the stock trading around $103 and some brokers having lowered their targets. The article also highlights near-term risks for Disney, including an FCC review of broadcast licenses and public relations challenges from recent Marvel layoffs.

articles.title: Mutual Advisors LLC Decreases Holdings in The Walt Disney Company $DIS
articles.summary: Mutual Advisors LLC reduced its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 10.7% in Q4, selling 7,246 shares and retaining 60,588 shares valued at $6.89 million. Despite this, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $133.53. The company faces mixed near-term outlook with strengths in parks and live entertainment, but also regulatory uncertainty from an FCC review and negative PR from Marvel layoffs.

articles.title: Sigma Planning Corp Lowers Holdings in The Walt Disney Company $DIS
articles.summary: Sigma Planning Corp reduced its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 25% in the fourth quarter, selling 9,266 shares and holding 27,813 shares worth approximately $3.165 million. Despite this, analysts largely maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $133.53, following Disney's Q4 earnings beat of $1.63 EPS against an expected $1.57. Institutional investors own a significant portion of the company's stock, at 65.71%.
